name: sitegeist
description: Your AI companion for the web - Research, automate, create

content_security_policy.sandbox: sandbox allow-scripts allow-modals; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https: http:; script-src-elem 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https: http:; connect-src * data: blob:; img-src * data: blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https: http:; font-src * data:; worker-src blob:; child-src blob: https: http:; object-src 'none'
